inputs.label: Job Revenue
inputs.businessContext: Total revenue from the painting job, typically specified in contract. Based on standard job costing principles (Maynard Industrial Engineering Handbook).

inputs.label: Material Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of paint, primer, and other materials. Includes waste factor. Referenced from construction estimating standards (RSMeans).

inputs.label: Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total direct labor hours for the job. Based on time studies or historical data (Lean/Six Sigma).

inputs.label: Hourly Labor Rate
inputs.businessContext: Average hourly wage including burden. Industry benchmark from Bureau of Labor Statistics.

inputs.label: Equipment Cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost of renting or using painting equipment (sprayers, scaffolding). Based on equipment lifecycle cost (ISO 15663).

inputs.label: Overhead Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Indirect costs as percentage of direct costs. Typical range 10-20% for painting contractors (industry standard).

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of area requiring rework due to defects. Six Sigma target <1%. Based on quality standards (ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Unit Area
inputs.businessContext: Cost to rework one square foot of defective paint. Includes labor and material. Industry average from painting contractors.

inputs.label: Total Area Painted
inputs.businessContext: Total surface area to be painted. Key driver of job size. Standard unit in construction.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Affects final profit adjustment. Based on risk management (PMBOK).

thresholds.defectRate: defectRate > 5 -> 'High defect rate: consider process improvement'
thresholds.profitMargin: profitMargin < 10 -> 'Low profit margin: review costs or pricing'
thresholds.overheadPercent: overheadPercent > 20 -> 'Overhead above typical range: investigate indirect costs'

suggestedActions: defectRate > 5 ? 'Implement quality control and training to reduce defects' : ''
overheadPercent > 20 ? 'Review overhead allocation and reduce indirect costs' : ''
profitMargin < 10 ? 'Negotiate higher price or reduce direct costs' : ''
